description: A taxpayer wants to convert a portion of their traditional IRA to a Roth IRA and needs to know the tax cost.

nodes.task_description: Determine the amount the taxpayer wishes to convert.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets the conversion amount from the client.

nodes.task_description: Explain that the converted amount will be treated as taxable income in the current year.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly communicates the tax implications.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the additional income tax that will be due as a result of the conversion based on the taxpayer's marginal tax rate.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides a precise estimate of the tax cost of the conversion.
